Focus instead on brands like Ecosa and Koala that offer excellent trial periods and reasonable 10-15 year warranties with straightforward claims processes.

prompts.label: mattress materials
prompts.query: what materials should I look for in a quality mattress

prompts.label: sleep position
prompts.query: how does sleep position affect mattress choice
prompts.claudeResponse: Back sleepers need firm mattresses with lumbar support, side sleepers require softer options with hip cushioning, and stomach sleepers benefit from firmer surfaces maintaining spine alignment. Your ideal mattress firmness depends primarily on sleeping position, body weight, and existing pain points; adjustable options like Ecosa work well for mixed sleepers.
prompts.gptResponse: Your sleep position affects the type of mattress you need; side sleepers typically benefit from softer mattresses for pressure relief, while back or stomach sleepers may need more firm support to maintain proper spine alignment.
